signals.signal_title: FY2024 Adjusted EBITDA above guidance; 2025 capital plan $640M
signals.signal_description: FY2024 Adjusted EBITDA $2.78B attributable to PAA, above top of guidance. 2025 guidance $2.80-2.95B. $400M growth capital + $240M maintenance capital planned for 2025.
signals.source: Plains All American Q4 2024 earnings release

signals.signal_description: Closed three bolt-on acquisitions including Ironwood Midstream Energy for ~$670M net to PAA in Q1 2025, expanding integrated midstream asset base.

spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: No standalone CIO identified. No digital transformation signals. No AI programs. Primarily pipeline ops focus. Enverus pipeline data platform. Score 4 — well below ≥15 threshold.

enrichment_notes: Publicly traded MLP owning and operating midstream energy infrastructure — crude oil, NGL and natural gas pipelines, terminalling, storage and gathering. HQ 333 Clay Street Houston TX (STOLA, no channel mismatch). FY2024 revenue $50.1B (commodity pass-through heavy — midstream denominator Revenue×0.12 applies). Adjusted EBITDA FY2024 $3.33B, 2025 guidance $2.80-2.95B. ~4,200 employees. No standalone CIO identified — operations-focused MLP with lean corporate structure. Tech stack basic: Kubernetes, Citrix, Windows Server, Enverus. No confirmed MSP. CEO Willie Chiang. Active bolt-on acquisition program (Ironwood Midstream closed Q1 2025). WWT angle: OT/SCADA modernization, pipeline data management, cybersecurity for critical infrastructure.
